response.original_title: Giving Milk to the Little One
response.overview: You don't need to be too astute to realize that the milk referred to in the title of Giving Milk to the Little One, the latest offering from Hot Twinks, has nothing to do with cows. Indeed, it's the hot, sticky goo that's stored inside the ball-sacs of the likes of Johnathan Strake, Kyle Wilkinson, and all their equally horny mates that takes center-stage here; as each of these horny, hung buddies take full opportunity to engage in the kind of wanton gay action that we know twink fans are just gonna love. Cue a seemingly mindless foray into hot fornication that sees each of these lads sucking and fucking like the animals they were seemingly born to be, culminating in a torrent of spunk getting sprayed in all directions to leave each one of these beauties totally drained.
response.title: Giving Milk to the Little One
